name: VR Ludo Quest
summary: The timeless board game, reimagined for VR! Step into VR Ludo Quest, a polished and relaxing 3D experience where strategy meets luck. Challenge smart AI in 2-player or 4-player modes within a beautifully immersive environment. Roll the giant dice, plan your moves, and race your tokens to the finish line. It’s the classic Ludo experience you love, now in a distraction-free virtual world!
